trades.reasoning: Score dropped to 30 with bearish MACD, price now below SMA-20 — momentum has reversed and capital is better deployed into score-95 candidates.
Score 95, RSI 69.3 in bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, price above SMA-20 — large-cap with strong technical setup and room before overbought.
Score 95 with RSI at 57.3 — the lowest RSI among score-95 names, meaning the most runway before overbought territory with full bullish MACD confirmation.
Score 95, RSI 67.6, price 12% above SMA-20 showing strong breakout, healthcare sector adds defensive diversification to the portfolio.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today with NASDAQ up a hair and S&P unchanged — a true neutral session offering no strong macro tailwind or headwind. AMD's momentum has clearly deteriorated (score fell to 30, now below SMA-20 with bearish MACD), so I rotated that capital into three score-95 momentum plays. VKTX leads with the best RSI entry point among top-tier candidates, while AMZN offers large-cap safety alongside strong technicals.

market_education.summary_en: Markets drifted sideways Monday as investors digested last week's volatility and awaited fresh catalysts. With no major macro data or Fed commentary driving sentiment, the session was characterized by light volume and sector-level rotations rather than broad directional moves. Traders appeared to be repositioning within momentum themes — rotating into names with cleaner technical setups while trimming those showing early reversal signs.
market_education.summary_zh: 週一市場整體橫向整理，投資者在消化上週波動後靜待新催化劑。由於缺乏重大宏觀數據或聯準會表態，本次交易日成交量清淡，市場呈現板塊輪動特徵，而非整體方向性行情。交易員傾向於增持技術面乾淨的動能股，同時削減已出現反轉跡象的持倉。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation is the strategy of selling stocks whose price momentum is weakening and redeploying that capital into stocks with stronger, rising momentum. Today's AMD sale — a stock that went from a screener candidate to a score-30 bearish signal — and reinvestment into score-95 names like VKTX and AMZN is a textbook example. The goal is to always keep capital working in the assets with the strongest current trend.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪動是指賣出價格動能減弱的股票，並將資金轉移至動能更強的股票的策略。今日賣出評分降至30的AMD，轉而買入評分95的VKTX與AMZN，正是此策略的典型操作。其核心邏輯是讓資金持續配置於當前趨勢最強的資產，避免守住失速的部位。
